title: FightersClub App
description: A comprehensive fitness platform for combat sports enthusiasts with personalized training programs and community features.
longDescription: FightersClub is a premium fitness application designed specifically for combat sports athletes. It features AI-powered training recommendations, video tutorials from professional fighters, progress tracking, and a supportive community platform. Built with React Native for cross-platform performance.

title: Hefner Market
description: Custom Shopify theme for a premium Y2K/Opium-inspired streetwear brand with 85/100 performance score.
longDescription: Hefner Market is a custom Shopify theme for a luxury streetwear brand featuring Solid Matte Black backgrounds, Gallery-style 48px spacing, and 3D animated branding. Achieved 90% payload reduction (7.7MB to 755KB) via hybrid WebP/GIF picture strategy, hardware-accelerated AJAX cart, and structural performance mitigations. Design score: 10.0/10.

title: Corner Man Platform
description: Premium fitness content platform with video streaming, PWA capabilities, and subscription management.
longDescription: Corner Man is a Next.js-based fitness platform featuring Mux video streaming, Stripe subscription integration, and progressive web app distribution. Built with a focus on Apple Human Interface Guidelines for a premium, polished user experience.

title: Venture Builder OS
description: A Notion-based operating system for managing multiple digital ventures as a Fractional CTO.
longDescription: Venture Builder OS is a comprehensive framework for portfolio management across multiple digital brands. Features the 4-Pillar Bridge Pattern (Mission, Actions, Past, Stats) for workspace synchronization, multi-tenant database tracking, and AI-assisted workflow automation.

title: YouTube Intro Generator
description: A Remotion-powered video generation tool for creating cinematic YouTube intros with code.
longDescription: Built with Remotion, this tool generates professional sports-themed intro animations programmatically. Features dramatic lighting, smoke effects, and impact animations. All video content is created with React components.

title: Players Club Community
description: A thriving Discord community for the Coach Josh Official brand, fostering engagement for 120+ members.
longDescription: Founded and administer the 'Players Club' Discord server for the Coach Josh Official brand. This community serves as a central hub for fitness enthusiasts, providing exclusive content, direct engagement, and a supportive environment for personal development. Responsible for community management, bot integration, and engagement strategy.

title: Enterprise Video Solutions
description: Custom video engineering solutions for major media clients including NBC, NPR, Forbes, and Hedgeye.
longDescription: Engineered bespoke video implementations for high-profile enterprise clients using JW Player's advanced capabilities. Solutions included custom advertising integrations (VAST/VPAID), DRM implementation, and specialized player behaviors using JavaScript. These optimizations directly contributed to a $4M+ book of business and significant churn reduction.

title: Project Negus
description: Exploration of the cultures and people of the diaspora through various art mediums.
longDescription: The negus project was the exploration of the cultures and people of the diaspora through various art mediums, encouraging the rediscovery and collaboration of African roots. Goal: Celebration of our people, by our people; The Unification of Us. Included events like panel discussions on Childish Gambino's 'Awaken My Love!'.

videos.title: Panel Discussion
videos.description: Community panel discussion on cultural impact.
